title: Tz_PressForce Property
description:
This property sets pressing force to Tz direction during the execution of force guide objects.

It is used when Tz_ControlMode is Press+ or Press-.

Values

When ControlMode is Press+:

Minimum value -18000

Maximum value 0

Default:  0

When ControlMode is Press-:

Minimum value 0

Maximum value 18000

Default:  0

See Also: Tz_PressForce Property

Ty_PressForce Property
see_also:
Applies To

Press Object, PressMove Object
